spring-boot-2-jdbc-with-h2/src/main/java.general_idea: Reorder arguments in jdbcTemplate.queryForObject to match Spring Boot 3 / Spring Framework 6 API signature.
spring-boot-2-jdbc-with-h2/src/main/java.why_exists: Compile error: The method signature for queryForObject changed in Spring Framework 6 (required by Spring Boot 3), removing the varargs Object[] parameter from the position after the RowMapper or changing the order, causing a method not found or ambiguous invocation error.
spring-boot-2-jdbc-with-h2/src/main/java.before: jdbcTemplate.queryForObject("select * from student where id=?", new Object[]{id}, new BeanPropertyRowMapper<Student>(Student.class))
spring-boot-2-jdbc-with-h2/src/main/java.after: jdbcTemplate.queryForObject("select * from student where id=?", new BeanPropertyRowMapper<Student>(Student.class), new Object[]{id})
